info.name: Ecom Cart & Checkout Backend
info.description: Self-contained collection: EVERY request signs its own JWT locally in its pre-request script (matching src/config/settings.py's dev secret) - no dependency on collection-level script scope carrying over, since Collection Runner doesn't guarantee that across folder-only runs. HOW TO RUN: (1) start the server with `uvicorn src.main:app --reload`. (2) For a clean 'Milestone Walkthrough' run, restart the server first (no reset endpoint exists; state is in-memory) - right-click the folder -> Run folder. (3) Running the ENTIRE collection at once works but shifts the milestone math if other folders already placed orders - restart the server first. Note: this Postman suite is a manual/demo smoke test; the graded, authoritative test suite is `pytest` (tests/, 26 assertions).

item.name: Generate Discount Codes - Forbidden for Non-Admin

pm.test('Has expected fields', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); ['total_orders','total_items_purchased','total_revenue','total_discount_amount','discount_codes'].forEach(k => pm.expect(b).to.have.property(k)); });

item.name: Milestone Walkthrough (run this folder in isolation, on a freshly restarted server)
item.description: Right-click this folder -> Run folder, immediately after restarting uvicorn. Do NOT run alongside other folders in the same server session.
